title.en: France superstars thriving thanks to Deschamps' bold changes
title.zh-CN: 得益于Deschamps的大胆改变，法国超级巨星蓬勃发展

summary.en: Why Didier Deschamps' changes to personnel and formation could propel 2022 runners-up France to go one better in this World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 为什么迪迪埃·德尚（ Didier Deschamps ）对人员和阵型的改变可能会推动2022年法国亚军在本届世界杯上取得更好的成绩。

title.en: Germany fans in need of hope as prospect of Klopp looms
title.zh-CN: 由于克洛普的前景迫在眉睫，德国球迷需要希望

summary.en: As Germany again fail to progress at a World Cup BBC Sport looks at the fallout from their defeat by Paraguay and what happens next.
summary.zh-CN: 由于德国再次未能在世界杯上取得进展， BBC Sport着眼于他们被巴拉圭击败的后果以及接下来会发生什么。

title.en: The Paraguay hero who sold his kit when his son was born
title.zh-CN: 这位巴拉圭英雄在儿子出生时卖掉了他的工具包

summary.en: Orlando Gill has become Paraguay's World Cup hero but was in football obscurity 18 months ago and had to sell his kit to support his family after the premature birth of his son.
summary.zh-CN: 奥兰多·吉尔（ Orlando Gill ）已成为巴拉圭的世界杯英雄，但18个月前他还默默无闻，不得不在儿子早产后出售他的套件来养家糊口。

title.en: Coach played mind games with Cusack before death, inquest told
title.zh-CN: 调查告知，教练在死前与库萨克玩了心理游戏

summary.en: A team-mate tells an inquest Maddy Cusack was "anxious" about Jonathan Morgan joining Sheffield United.
summary.zh-CN: 一名队友告诉调查员， Maddy Cusack对Jonathan Morgan加入谢菲尔德联队感到“焦虑”。

title.en: US security chief 'danced happy dance' after Iran exit
title.zh-CN: 美国安全局局长在伊朗退出后“跳快乐舞蹈”

summary.en: The United States' head of homeland security says he "danced a happy dance" when Iran's elimination from the World Cup was confirmed.
summary.zh-CN: 美国国土安全部负责人表示，当伊朗从世界杯上被淘汰时，他“跳了一支快乐的舞”。

title.en: Emotional Gakpo scores days after loss of unborn son
title.zh-CN: 情感Gakpo在失去未出生的儿子后几天得分

summary.en: Liverpool forward Cody Gakpo scores for the Netherlands days after the loss of his unborn son, as they are knocked out on penalties by Morocco.
summary.zh-CN: 利物浦前锋科迪·加克波（ Cody Gakpo ）在失去未出生的儿子几天后为荷兰队得分，因为他们在摩洛哥的处罚中被淘汰出局。

title.en: Netherlands crumble in penalty shootout as Morocco reach last 16
title.zh-CN: 荷兰队在点球大战中崩溃，摩洛哥队进入16强

summary.en: Netherlands miss three spot kicks as Morocco come from behind to beat the Dutch on penalties in Monterrey to reach the last 16 of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 荷兰错过了三场比赛，摩洛哥队在蒙特雷击败荷兰队，进入2026年世界杯的最后16场比赛。

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Does Germany’s last 32 exit spell the end for manager Julian Nagelsmann?
summary.zh-CN: 德国的最后32次退出是否意味着经理朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）的终结

title.en: Kane will sign new Bayern deal - Tuesday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 凯恩将签署新的拜仁协议-周二的八卦

summary.en: Harry Kane will extend his Bayern Munich contract, Manchester City plan major rebuild and Dortmund's Felix Nmecha prefers Manchester United to Newcastle.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）将延长他的拜仁慕尼黑合同，曼城计划进行重大重建，多特蒙德的费利克斯·恩梅查（ Felix Nmecha ）更喜欢曼联而不是纽卡斯尔。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 23
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星23号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: 'Indescribably hurt' Son apologises for South Korea World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: “无法形容的伤害”孙正义为韩国世界杯退出道歉

summary.en: Son Heung-min apologises for South Korea's early World Cup exit and says he will "run to death" for the nation's football fans.
summary.zh-CN: 孙兴民为韩国提前退出世界杯道歉，并表示他将为该国的足球迷“奔跑致死”。

title.en: Ranking 10 stars who could be at their last World Cup
title.zh-CN: 排名可能参加上一届世界杯的10颗星

summary.en: A number of the world's best players are likely playing in their last World Cup. Here's how I think they rank.
summary.zh-CN: 一些世界上最好的球员可能正在参加他们的上一届世界杯。我认为他们是这样排名的。

summary.en: Germany and the Netherlands crash out as Humphrey Ker joins the pod.
summary.zh-CN: 随着汉弗莱·克尔（ Humphrey Ker ）加入吊舱，德国和荷兰崩溃了。
